She strides through rain-slicked neon streets, one hand brushing wet hair from her optic sensors.
Her servo fingers snap shut, catching a data chip thrown from across the darkened room.
She reaches upward toward a flickering holographic interface, cybernetic arm fully extended and glowing.
Mid-stride she turns her head sharply, glancing over her shoulder at something pursuing behind her.
She pushes through a beaded curtain doorway, strings parting around her armored shoulders and face.
Kneeling circuitry exposed, she pulls fiber-optic cables from her forearm to splice into a terminal.
She runs full-sprint down a burning corridor, coat billowing and boots pounding against metal grating.
Her hand presses against ancient alien stone, causing luminous symbols to spread outward from her palm.
She draws a plasma pistol from her thigh holster in one smooth, practiced motion.
Emerging from thick steam vents, she walks forward as vapor swirls around her armored legs.
She leans sideways against a graffiti-covered wall, one boot propped up, scanning the street ahead.
Her mechanical fingers delicately lift a glowing vial from a shattered lab table for examination.
She shoves aside a malfunctioning security drone, sparks flying as her palm connects with metal.
Walking through a crowded market, she ducks under hanging cables while scanning vendor stalls ahead.
She yanks a maintenance panel from her open shoulder joint, diagnostic lights flickering across circuitry.
Her boot kicks open a rusted door, metal shrieking as hinges give way completely.
She extends her arm forward, energy crackling between her fingertips and an activated power conduit.
Mid-step she swings her torso around, coat spinning as she changes direction down an alley.
She drags her fingertips along a frozen wall, ice crystals forming and spreading in her wake.
Her hand closes around the grip of a mounted weapon, servo motors whirring as she tears it free.
She walks backward slowly, keeping her optical sensors locked on something beyond camera view.
Bending at the waist, she retrieves scattered ammunition clips from debris-covered concrete floor.
She threads sideways through a narrow gap between two buildings, arms pressed close to her body.
Her fingers dance across a wrist-mounted keypad, projecting code streams into the air before her.
She strides across a suspended walkway, reaching out to steady herself against the railing mid-crossing.
